chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-493 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). For orders as to maintainability. 23.08.2021 Mr. Imran Ali Abro, Advocate for the petitioner..-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner, on instructions, does not press this petition which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed alongwith pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
